query: SELECT a.id, a.orderNumber, a.totalAmount, a.storeName, a.imageUrl, a.aiDecision, a.aiConfidence, r.totalAmount as r_totalAmount, r.storeName as r_storeName, r.imageUrl as r_imageUrl, r.imageUrls as r_imageUrls, r.ocrRawText IS NOT NULL as r_has_ocr, r.pointsAwarded as r_pointsAwarded, r.pointsCalculated as r_pointsCalculated FROM ai_auto_review_logs a LEFT JOIN line_receipts r ON a.receiptId = r.id WHERE a.isDryRun = 0 ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT a.id, a.orderNumber, a.totalAmount, a.storeName, a.imageUrl, a.aiDecision, a.aiConfidence, r.totalAmount as r_totalAmount, r.storeName as r_storeName, r.imageUrl as r_imageUrl, r.imageUrls as r_imageUrls, r.ocrRawText IS NOT NULL as r_has_ocr, r.pointsAwarded as r_pointsAwarded, r.pointsCalculated as r_pointsCalculated FROM ai_auto_review_logs a LEFT JOIN line_receipts r ON a.receiptId = r.id WHERE a.isDryRun = 0 ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
